---
title: "Contact"
---

# Contact Me

I am actively seeking opportunities in Banking or Investment Analysis in the Canadian market. Feel free to reach out!

## Contact Information
- **Email**: [siddharthgole111@gmail.com](mailto:siddharthgole111@gmail.com)  
- **Phone**: (672) 699-5417  
- **Location**: Vancouver, BC  

Let’s discuss how my finance background and quantitative skills can add value to your team.
